connectors.label: Codex
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM accepts controlled dry-run plan; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass; orchestration:check + lint/build when code changes
connectors.approvalEvidence: Get-Command and preflight resolve codex on PATH only; missing controlled dry-run design, non-interactive JSON/auth-quota/timeout evidence, and no-UI proof.

connectors.label: Trae
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM confirms executable path and non-interactive args; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.approvalEvidence: Get-Command does not resolve a trae executable; command must stay empty until PM/user supplies the exact non-interactive invocation.

connectors.label: Qoder
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM confirms executable path and verification surface; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.approvalEvidence: Get-Command does not resolve a qoder executable; command must stay empty until PM/user supplies the exact invocation and verification surface.
